archive_data.question_text: The structures of temples located in India are classified as phamsana and latina on the basis of which of their parts?

explanation.english: In North Indian temple architecture (Nagara style), the Shikhara (tower/spire) is classified based on its shape into Latina (curvilinear) and Phamsana (stepped pyramidal) types.
explanation.tanglish: Uttara indiya kovil kattida muraiyil (Nagara thotil), Shikhara (gopuram) dhisai muraiyai azhaithu Latina (vakaiver adakkam) matrum Phamsana (padipatta piramid) endru vakuppikkappadugindrathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following is the major reservoir of carbon on earth?

explanation.english: Oceans are the largest carbon reservoirs on Earth, storing approximately 38,000 gigatons of carbon, significantly more than the atmosphere or terrestrial ecosystems.
explanation.tanglish: Kadalkal ulagil ulla miga periya karbon paadukaappugalaga ullana. Idhu karbonaipadai 38,000 gigaton karbonai saitaayamaga nilaiyattrullathu, idhu kaatru mandalam matrum nilathiru kattida nilaikal vida miga athigam.

archive_data.question_text: If nominal GDP is ₹1,800 and real GDP is ₹1,000. What will be the value of GDP deflator?

explanation.english: GDP Deflator is calculated as (Nominal GDP / Real GDP) × 100. Substituting the values: (1800/1000) × 100 = 180%.
explanation.tanglish: GDP Deflator formula anuppadi (Nominal GDP / Real GDP) × 100 endru kanakida vendum. Maathirkaigalai marapatharku: (1800/1000) × 100 = 180%.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following dance forms is performed by the tribal people of Andhra Pradesh?

explanation.english: Dhimsa is a traditional folk dance performed by the tribal communities of Araku Valley in Andhra Pradesh. Bihu is from Assam, Garba from Gujarat, and Jawara from Madhya Pradesh.
explanation.tanglish: Dhimsa endrathu Andhra Pradesh-il Araku malaigalilulla ina makkal aadum oru padal aattam. Bihu endrathu Assam-kku uriyathu, Garba Gujarat-kku uriyathu, matrum Jawara Madhya Pradesh-kku uriyathu.

archive_data.question_text: At what degree from the epicentre does the seismograph record the arrival of P-waves but NOT S-waves?

explanation.english: S-waves cannot travel through the Earth's liquid outer core, creating a shadow zone beyond 105° from the epicenter where they are not recorded, while P-waves continue to be detected.
explanation.tanglish: S-tarangal ulagin naduvilulla thanmaiyana ul padalam veedil payanam seyyamale, 105° thaandi seismograph-il pidikkappadaadhu, anaithu P-tarangal pidikkappadum.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following statements is/are true about globalisation? I. It is about integration with world economies II. It promotes competition among producers III. Appreciation of domestic currency improves exports

explanation.english: Globalization involves integration with world economies (I) and promotes competition among producers (II). However, appreciation of domestic currency makes exports expensive, thereby reducing exports, not improving them (III is false).
explanation.tanglish: Ulaga maitthanmai ulaga arthangaludan ondripatuthal (I) matrum ilainjarkal idaiyil pothechchi varuthuvathu (II) unmai. Ana, nattu mudra vakeerippu voopa vilaivukkalai vila perukkum, athanai yum vilaivukkalai kuraiyum, matramillai (III poiyana seithi).
